title: Intense Smoky Tunisian Duck Carpaccio
description: Thinly sliced smoked duck breast tossed in a smoky Tunisian spice blend, served cold and crunchy for a post-workout boost.
instructions: Slice the duck breast into 1 mm thick strips and place them on a chilled platter.
Heat a small skillet until hot, pour olive oil, and watch smoke until it starts to billow, then remove and let cool.
Whisk lemon juice, smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper together to make a dressing.
Drizzle the dressing over the duck slices, ensuring each is coated evenly.
Scatter the toasted pine nuts over the top for crunch and nutty aroma.
Refrigerate the carpaccio for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Just before serving, drizzle a thin line of charred olive oil over the slices.
Serve immediately with a side of crisp cucumber ribbons or a light salad.
